title: DNSDB - IPs from Hostname
content:
A playbook that uses DNSDB to retrieve all IPs seen for a given hostname around the time of observation.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Farsight Security, Inc. pack (DNSDB, partner-supported).

Inputs — Domain: The domain name to enhance with IP addresses from Farsight DNSDB..

Outputs — resolvedIPs: An array of one or more IP addresses that the input domain names have resolved to..

Integrations/scripts used: DNSDB_v2.

description: A playbook that uses DNSDB to retrieve all IPs seen for a given hostname
